title: cineraria angulosa
intro: Cineraria angulosa, also known as the Silver Dust or Silver Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, Cineraria angulosa has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which helps to treat wounds, skin conditions, and various other health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic agent to prevent the spread of infections. In herbal preparations, Cineraria angulosa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
